name: Prompt Compress
description: Compresses prompts before model execution using the prompt-compress CLI.

command.label: Compressor Command
command.help: CLI command to execute (default: PROMPT_COMPRESS_BIN env var, then 'compress').

targetModel.label: Target Model
targetModel.help: Tokenizer model id used for token accounting (default: gpt-4).

useOnnx.label: Use ONNX
useOnnx.help: Enable ONNX scoring mode for prompt compression.

modelDir.label: Model Directory
modelDir.help: Directory containing model.onnx and tokenizer.json when ONNX mode is enabled.

minChars.label: Minimum Prompt Length
minChars.help: Skip compression for prompts shorter than this many characters (default: 80).

timeoutMs.label: Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: Max time to wait for compressor CLI per prompt (default: 2000).

onlyIfSmaller.label: Only If Smaller
onlyIfSmaller.help: Only apply replacement when compressed token count is lower than original.
